title: Isnardia mollis
taxonomy: Isnardia mollis is a genus within the family Aroideae, which is a subgroup of the Arum family (Araceae). The plant belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. Isnardia mollis is further classified into the class Liliopsida and the order Alismatales. The family Aroideae includes various species of flowering plants, commonly known as aroids. Isnardia mollis is native to Africa, where it grows in humid, subtropical environments.
